column5: This list was the basis of a special podcast episode. Check the link for more https://jxnfilm.club/#animated-features

Entered by Michael

This film is my waypoint for consciousness -- I came to an understanding of death emotionally because of this movie. Nothing has ever quite hit the same, to be honest.
Entered by Michael When my parents would go to their weekly bowling league, I was the kid who would change the TV to Rock-A-Doodle at the childcare center next door.

Entered by Michael

This was when I realized that animation is for grownups, and that grownup stories can be told through animation. I love how this changed my imagination.

Entered by Michael I found this not far from the age of Chihiro. It means a lot to me because I moved twice before the age of 10 and this film teaches about life in its own way, through the eyes of a young person who has been Spirited Away.

Entered by Michael

This anime popped up on Adult Swim, but I never finished the series on the air. Nearly 20 years later, I've finally watched the entirety and absolutely loved the ending.
